sourcePrompt: A small Vietnamese Catholic mission church, French-built, about eight meters wide with its bell tower reaching twice the height of the nave. A white stucco church with a steep gabled roof, a narrow square tower centered on the front face carrying an arched open belfry under a small spire with a cross, tall arched windows down the sides, and an arched doorway up a few steps. White stucco and gray tile, quietly dignified.
